title: Validation returns 422 instead of 400
evidence: src/handlers.rs:24-33 returns StatusCode::UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY for missing title/author; REQUIREMENTS.json R9 how_to_verify expects rejection with 400
suggestion: 422 is a defensible choice for semantic validation, but return 400 to match the spec's stated status code if strict conformance is desired

title: SQLite opened in-memory — data not durable across restarts
evidence: src/main.rs:26 Connection::open_in_memory(); README.md documents this as an in-memory database
suggestion: Open a file-backed SQLite database (Connection::open(path)) if persistence across process restarts is intended; requirement is satisfied since a real embedded DB is used

title: 10 integration tests, well beyond the 3-test minimum
evidence: src/main.rs:118-283 — 10 #[tokio::test] fns covering health, create happy/missing-title/missing-author, list empty/populated/filter, get 404, update+delete, update 404, delete 404
